name: Pork Cheek and Onion
steps: Clean the cheeks well. Making sure to remove all the hair.
Salt for half an hour with grey salt.
Wash, dry and vac without anything.
Portion 100g slices then vac and store for service.
Reduce chicken stock and blend together.
Put in bottles and store in the water bath.
Add the salt and massage until the onion becomes water.
Mix with the vinegar and the oregano.
Heat to cool then add to the onion.
Leave to rest in the fridge overnight.

finishing_and_plating: Warm one portion of the pork in the water bath.
Torch the pork, both sides charred.
Cover with sauce and finish with 20g of onion on the side.
